name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-af

metadata.name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-af
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Tencent Cloud Af SDK for Python

documentation:
# Tencent Cloud SDK for Python

Tencent Cloud Python Af SDK is the official software development kit, which allows Python developers to write software that makes use of Tencent Cloud services like CVM and CBS.
The SDK works on Python versions:

> - 2.7 and greater, including 3.x

## Quick Start

First, install the library:

```sh
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-af
```

or download source code from github and install:

```sh
$ git clone https://github.com/tencentcloud/tencentcloud-sdk-python.git
$ cd tencentcloud-sdk-python
$ python package.py --components common af
```

methods.name: tencentcloud.af.v20200226.af_client.AfClient.DescribeAntiFraud
documentation:
该接口未在使用，后端地址已无法访问，经查近60天日志无正常业务访问记录，申请预下线。

天御反欺诈服务，主要应用于银行、证券、保险、消费金融等金融行业客户，通过腾讯的大数据风控能力，
可以准确识别恶意用户信息，解决客户在支付、活动、理财，风控等业务环节遇到的欺诈威胁，降低企业
的损失。

```
param request

Request instance for DescribeAntiFraud.

type request



rtype

```

classes.name: tencentcloud.af.v20200226.models.FinanceAntiFraudCryptoFilter

methods.name: tencentcloud.af.v20200226.models.FinanceAntiFraudCryptoFilter.__init__
documentation:
---
param _CryptoContent: "\u4E1A\u52A1\u5B57\u6BB5BusinessSecurityData\u7684json\u6570\
  \u636E\u683C\u5F0F\uFF0C\u91C7\u7528CryptoType\u76F8\u5E94\u7684\u52A0\u5BC6\u65B9\
  \u5F0F\u8BA1\u7B97\u540E\u5F97\u5230\u7684bash64\u7F16\u7801\u5185\u5BB9\u3002\u6BD4\
  \u5982\u5BF9{\"PhoneNumber\":\"13430420001\",\"IdNumber\":\"420115199501010001\"\
  ,\"BankCardNumber\":\"6214000100010001\"}\u5305\u4F53\u505A\u52A0\u5BC6\u3002"
param _CryptoType: "\u503C1\u5B9A\u4E49\uFF1AAES\u52A0\u5BC6\u65B9\u5F0F\\[\u52A0\u5BC6\
  \u6A21\u5F0FECB\uFF1B\u586B\u5145\u683C\u5F0Fpkcs7padding\uFF1B\u79D8\u94A516\u5B57\
  \u8282\u5373128\u4F4D"
type CryptoContent: str
type CryptoType: str
---

methods.name: tencentcloud.af.v20200226.models.FinanceAntiFraudCryptoFilter.CryptoType
documentation:
值1定义：AES加密方式\[加密模式ECB；填充格式pkcs7padding；秘钥16字节即128位
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.af.v20200226.models.FinanceAntiFraudCryptoFilter.CryptoContent
documentation:
业务字段BusinessSecurityData的json数据格式，采用CryptoType相应的加密方式计算后得到的bash64编码内容。比如对{"PhoneNumber":"13430420001","IdNumber":"420115199501010001","BankCardNumber":"6214000100010001"}包体做加密。
\:rtype: str
借贷反欺诈密文业务入参

methods.name: tencentcloud.af.v20200226.models.QueryAntiFraudResponse.__init__
documentation:
> ```
> param _Found
>
> 表示该条记录能否查到：1为能查到，-1为查不到
>
> type Found
>
> int
>
> param _IdFound
>
> 表示该条Id能否查到：1为能查到，-1为查不到
>
> type IdFound
>
> int
>
> param _RiskScore
>
> 0~100;值越高 欺诈可能性越大（注：该字段真实类型为有符号整型）
>
> type RiskScore
>
> int
>
> param _RiskInfo
>
> 扩展字段，对风险类型的说明
>
> type RiskInfo
>
> list of RiskDetail
>
> param _CodeDesc
>
> 业务侧错误码。成功时返回Success，错误时返回具体业务错误原因。
> ```

注意：此字段可能返回 null，表示取不到有效值。
: ```
  type CodeDesc

  str

  param _RequestId

  唯一请求 ID，由服务端生成，每次请求都会返回（若请求因其他原因未能抵达服务端，则该次请求不会获得 RequestId）。定位问题时需要提供该次请求的 RequestId。

  type RequestId

  str
  ```
